summary: MIT Tech Review reporting on credible topic with defensible sourcing, but anonymous Pentagon officials + classified subject matter make verification impossible. Could be accurate policy foreshadowing or speculative handwaving dressed up as fact.
career_angle: LLM developments affect every developer. Understand the capabilities and limitations - knowing what AI can't do is as valuable as knowing what it can.
